subcodes.first_line: The exalted Truth hath borne witness to the greatness of this glorious Day and the majesty of the Cause, yet none hath understood the purpose of the utterance of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حق منیع گواهی داده ببزرگی این یوم عزیز و عظمت امر ولکن احدی مقصود بیان رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
